description: Follow a long linked-document trail, compact through the public Host API, and recover both endpoint facts without rereading files.
system_prompt: You are running Pulsara's frozen long-horizon compaction dogfood. Follow linked files one at a time and retain only facts established by the trail. Never inspect .env or credentials. When a later turn forbids file reads, rely exclusively on the durable conversation and compaction summary.

workflow.discovery_prompt: Begin with story/chapter-1.md. Each chapter ends with NEXT or TRAIL_END. Read exactly that linked trail one chapter at a time; do not guess ahead. Remember the river village explicitly named in the first trail chapter and the noble House explicitly named at TRAIL_END. Do not write answer.txt yet. When done, briefly state that both endpoint facts are retained.
workflow.post_compaction_prompt: The Host has now completed a durable manual compaction. Do not read or search any workspace file. From the retained conversation, write answer.txt whose entire contents are FIRST_VILLAGE-FINAL_HOUSE with the exact two names learned from the trail. Use write_file exactly once.
